description: Style NoteLook daper in these shirts from french connection. Button up and stand to attention in this checked semi -formal piece. Its  soft cotton fabric composition keeps you fresh all day long. Pair these shirts with formal pants on a casual Friday or with distresses denims and sandals for a weekend getaway.Product DetailsNavy blue and white checked shirt, has a narrow spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest with button and a pen slot, triple needle top stitch detail, brand patch near left bottom hem, curved hem with gussets at the sideMaterial and Care100% cottonWash with similar coloursIron on reverse sideSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
